phases.title: Foundation — Fix, Optimize, Launch
phases.description: Quick wins that create immediate momentum. Website speed & asset optimization — compress images, serve modern formats, and trim heavy scripts to fix the 62MB / 8.4s mobile load. On-page SEO repair — add the missing H1s, write Austin/geo-modified page titles, and tighten the auto-generated meta descriptions. GA4 migration & conversion tracking — replace the deprecated Universal Analytics with GA4 plus booking/event tracking so every channel is measurable. GBP optimization — complete categories, services, photos, and descriptions across cryo and the full menu. Review amplification — extend the automated review engine to sauna, massage & contouring, where review volume is thin, and keep the Google lead growing. Bing Places & listings tidy — claim the one missing directory and keep NAP consistent across platforms.

phases.title: Growth — Activate & Accelerate
phases.description: Turn on the channels the market is ignoring. Google Ads launch — first-mover paid search on high-intent cryo, sauna, contouring & massage terms with full conversion tracking. Meta paid social launch — activate the installed Meta Pixel — prospecting plus retargeting to the 5,418 Instagram / 2,021 Facebook audience. Service-line content build — dedicated, optimized pages for infrared sauna, body contouring, massage & facials to capture the searches EvolvE is invisible for. Short-form video kickoff — launch TikTok and Instagram Reels — recovery, results, and education content where wellness travels furthest. AI visibility groundwork — structured data, authoritative service content, and consistent business info to extend AI presence beyond cryotherapy.

phases.title: Scale — Compound & Lead
phases.description: Build a lasting competitive advantage. Link-building campaign — targeted outreach to extend the independent-authority lead and close the gap to the national chains. Paid social scale — expand the winning ad sets and layer in membership-conversion and seasonal offers. Content & review flywheel — ongoing service-specific content and review generation compounding into SEO and AI visibility. Performance benchmarking — measure progress against the baseline scores in this audit. Competitive monitoring — track rankings, reviews, and ad activity across the local set.
